message:
feat(connectors): add Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode connectors with factory registry

Adds three new AI coding agent connectors:
- CodexConnector: ingests OpenAI Codex CLI session logs
- CursorConnector: reads Cursor IDE state.vscdb SQLite databases
  (feature-gated behind "cursor" with urlencoding dependency)
- OpenCodeConnector: parses OpenCode session files
  (feature-gated behind "opencode")

Introduces get_connector_factories() centralized registry that returns
all compiled connector constructors, making it easy for callers to
iterate available connectors without hardcoding the list. The openclaw
connector receives minor formatting cleanup. Re-exports in lib.rs are
reorganized to expose new connectors and the factory registry at the
crate root.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
